data.description: A self-hosted web radio management suite, including turnkey installer tools for the full radio software stack and a modern, easy-to-use web app to manage your stations. - AzuraCast/AzuraCast

dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAzuraCast\u003c/strong\u003e is a self-hosted, all-in-one web radio management suite. AzuraCast works for\nweb radio stations of all types and sizes, and is built to run on even the most affordable VPS web hosts. href=\"https://www.azuracast.com/docs/help/troubleshooting/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eSupport page\u003c/a\u003e, which features solutions to a number of\ncommonly encountered issues and questions, as well as instructions on how to\ncheck your server's log files for more details. If you do need our help via GitHub, supplying these logs is absolutely\nessential in helping us diagnose and resolve your issue.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eNew feature requests are powered by FeatureUpvote. You can visit\nour \u003ca href=\"https://features.azuracast.com/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eFeature Request Page\u003c/a\u003e to submit a new feature request or vote on existing ones.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFor bug and error reports, we rely exclusively on\nour \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/AzuraCast/AzuraCast/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+sort%3Aupdated-desc\"\u003eGitHub Issues board\u003c/a\u003e to\ndiagnose, track and update these reports. First, check to make sure the issue you're experiencing isn't already reported\non GitHub. If it is, you can subscribe to the existing ticket for updates on the issue's progress. If your issue or\nrequest isn't already reported, click the \"New Issue\" button to create it. Make sure to follow the template provided, as\nit asks important details that are very important to our team.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003ePlease keep in mind that AzuraCast is a free software project built and maintained by volunteers, so there may be some\ndelays in getting back to you. We will make the absolute best effort possible to resolve your issues and answer your\nquestions.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eCommunities and Social Media\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-communities-and-social-media\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Communities and Social Media\" href=\"#communities-and-social-media\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWe frequently post to social media any time there are significant updates to our software, security issues that users\nshould be aware of, or upcoming changes to third-party software. <p dir="auto"><a href="https://depot.dev/?utm_source=AzuraCast" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/e15661df20f3e9b63fdc57dc108347964df42cd9add59db8e22ae7421136f889/68747470733a2f2f6465706f742e6465762f6261646765732f6275696c742d776974682d6465706f742e737667" alt="Built with Depot" data-canonical-src="https://depot.dev/badges/built-with-depot.svg" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>AzuraCast</strong> is a self-hosted, all-in-one web radio management suite. Using its easy installer and powerful but
intuitive web interface, you can start up a fully working web radio station in a few quick minutes. AzuraCast works for
web radio stations of all types and sizes, and is built to run on even the most affordable VPS web hosts. AzuraCast is
currently beta software.</p>

<p dir="auto">You can learn more about AzuraCast via our <a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs" rel="nofollow">Documentation</a>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/#core-features" rel="nofollow">About AzuraCast</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/#whats-included" rel="nofollow">Included Software</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/getting-started/requirements/" rel="nofollow">System Requirements</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/getting-started/installation/" rel="nofollow">Installation</a></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">AzuraCast is <strong>100% human-coded.</strong> We do not accept pull requests from AI assistants, nor do we allow AI to write our own code. Our application is the product of many years of hard work, and we want our users to have full trust and confidence in our code.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Live Demo</h2><a id="user-content-live-demo" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Live Demo" href="#live-demo"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Want to see AzuraCast for yourself? Visit our demo site at <a href="https://demo.azuracast.com/" rel="nofollow">demo.azuracast.com</a>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Username: <code>demo@azuracast.com</code></li>
<li>Password: <code>demo</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Install AzuraCast</h2><a id="user-content-install-azuracast" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Install AzuraCast" href="#install-azuracast"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">To install AzuraCast, you should have a basic understanding of the Linux shell terminal. Once installed, every aspect of
your radio station can be managed via AzuraCast's web interface.</p>
<p dir="auto">Follow our <strong><a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/getting-started/installation/" rel="nofollow">installation guide</a></strong> for instructions on
how
to install AzuraCast on your own server.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">License</h2><a id="user-content-license" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: License" href="#license"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Need Help?</h2><a id="user-content-need-help" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Need Help?" href="#need-help"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If you need help with AzuraCast, the first place you should visit is
our <a href="https://www.azuracast.com/docs/help/troubleshooting/" rel="nofollow">Support page</a>, which features solutions to a number of
commonly encountered issues and questions, as well as instructions on how to
check your server's log files for more details. If you do need our help via GitHub, supplying these logs is absolutely
essential in helping us diagnose and resolve your issue.</p>
<p dir="auto">New feature requests are powered by FeatureUpvote. You can visit
our <a href="https://features.azuracast.com/" rel="nofollow">Feature Request Page</a> to submit a new feature request or vote on existing ones.</p>
<p dir="auto">For bug and error reports, we rely exclusively on
our <a href="https://github.com/AzuraCast/AzuraCast/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+sort%3Aupdated-desc">GitHub Issues board</a> to
diagnose, track and update these reports. First, check to make sure the issue you're experiencing isn't already reported
on GitHub. If it is, you can subscribe to the existing ticket for updates on the issue's progress. If your issue or
request isn't already reported, click the "New Issue" button to create it. Make sure to follow the template provided, as
it asks important details that are very important to our team.</p>
<p dir="auto">Please keep in mind that AzuraCast is a free software project built and maintained by volunteers, so there may be some
delays in getting back to you. We will make the absolute best effort possible to resolve your issues and answer your
questions.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Communities and Social Media</h2><a id="user-content-communities-and-social-media" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Communities and Social Media" href="#communities-and-social-media"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We frequently post to social media any time there are significant updates to our software, security issues that users
should be aware of, or upcoming changes to third-party software. You can get these updates in a more timely fashion by
following our accounts:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto">On Bluesky at <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/azuracast.com" rel="nofollow">@azuracast.com</a></p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">On Mastodon at <a href="https://floss.social/@AzuraCast" rel="nofollow">@AzuraCast@floss.social</a></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">If you are an AzuraCast user, station owner, developer or other contributor, you can also join our Discord community,
where you can ask questions, share your station and more:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://discord.gg/azuracast" rel="nofollow">Discord</a></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Note that our social media channels aren't the best way to report issues to us; instead, you should use the GitHub
issues instructions above, as this allows our whole team to help resolve and track the progress of the issue in one
location.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Friends of AzuraCast</h2><a id="user-content-friends-of-azuracast" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Friends of AzuraCast" href="#friends-of-azuracast"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We would like to thank the following organizations for their support of AzuraCast's ongoing development:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://www.jetbrains.com/" rel="nofollow">JetBrains</a> for making our development faster, easier and more productive with tools like
PhpStorm</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://crowdin.com/" rel="nofollow">CrowdIn</a> for giving us a simple and powerful tool to help translate our application for users
around the world</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://www.netlify.com/" rel="nofollow">Netlify</a> for supporting open-source software like ours and for serving as the host of our
primary <a href="https://www.azuracast.com/" rel="nofollow">azuracast.com</a> website.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://www.browserstack.com/" rel="nofollow">BrowserStack</a> for giving us tools to help test our software's accessibility and
features across multiple browsers and operating systems.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://depot.dev/?utm_source=AzuraCast" rel="nofollow">Depot</a> for powering our Docker image builds.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p dir="auto">The creators and maintainers of the many free and open-source tools that AzuraCast is built on, who have done so much
to help move FOSS forward</p>
</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Support AzuraCast Development</h2><a id="user-content-support-azuracast-development" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Support AzuraCast Development" href="#support-azuracast-development"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">AzuraCast will always be available free of charge, but if you find the software useful and would like to support the
project's lead developer, visit either of the links below. Your support is greatly appreciated.</p>

  <h2 class="tmp-mb-3 h4">About</h2>

      <p class="f4 tmp-my-3">
        A self-hosted web radio management suite, including turnkey installer tools for the full radio software stack and a modern, easy-to-use web app to manage your stations.
      </p>
